name: Oriental Bar-b-q Pork Tenderloin Bbs Xfvf35a
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the pork tenderloin of all fat.
The sesame oil will prevent burning on the grill.
2. In a deep bowl, combine 1/3 cup soy sauce, 1/3 cup sesame oil, 3 minced garlic cloves, ground ginger, and MSG (if used).
Mix well to ensure the ginger is not clumping.
3. Place the pork into the marinade and refrigerate for 6 to 8 hours (overnight if preferred).
4. Remove the pork from the marinade and place it on a covered grill.
5. Add wet wood to the grill firepan to ensure an adequate supply of smoke.
6. Prepare the sauce by combining bottled bar-b-q sauce, 1/3 cup sesame oil, 1/3 cup soy sauce, and 1 minced garlic clove in a bowl.
Mix well.
7. Serve over sliced pork tenderloins.
